brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.angle: High-energy tough-love gym motivation showcasing real-time squat-proof durability and non-slip comfort of the Seamless Sage Green Leggings in a high-intensity gym setting.
strategy.cta: Tap the button below to secure your pair of Arrowow Active Seamless Leggings and elevate your training.
strategy.hook: Stop making excuses. If your leggings can't handle a deep squat, how are you going to survive leg day? Drop low and get to work.

script.script_text: Alright team, ... STOP making excuses! ... If your leggings can't handle a deep SQUAT ... how are you going to survive LEG DAY? ... Drop low ... and get to WORK! ... Quick reality check: ... Your gear needs to match your intensity ... and these Seamless Sage Green Leggings ... are built for pure PERFORMANCE ... We're talking real-time SQUAT-PROOF durability ... and absolute NON-SLIP comfort ... in the toughest gym settings ... Let's get after it today! ... Tap the button below to secure your pair of Arrowow Active Seamless Leggings ... and ELEVATE your training!

text_critic_report.feedback: The script strictly adheres to Sienna's persona: it avoids all prohibited phrases, implements all three catchphrases, and embodies her tough-love fitness bestie tone perfectly.

scenes.action: A fitness presenter stands in a clean, modern gym environment, looking directly into the camera with high energy and confidence. She speaks the words continuously with expressive facial expressions and natural hand gestures, maintaining consistent eye contact for perfect lip-sync throughout the entire video.
scenes.camera: Static, eye-level talking-head shot, medium close-up, keeping the presenter centered in the frame against a naturally blurred gym background.

wardrobe_location.location: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
wardrobe_location.wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).

static_frame_prompt.static_frame_prompt: A static, eye-level, medium close-up shot of a vibrant, professional fitness presenter named Sienna. Sienna is centered in the frame, looking directly into the camera lens with clear, confident eye contact in a continuous talking-head shot. Her mouth is moving naturally as she actively speaks and delivers her lines, accompanied by warm, expressive facial expressions and natural, energetic hand gestures. She is standing in a brightly lit, spacious, and modern gym with wall mirrors and organized free weights visible in the naturally blurred, soft-focus background. Sienna has her hair styled neatly out of her face, and is wearing a matching seamless sage green activewear top and matching athletic gear in a high-quality, modern aesthetic. The atmosphere is professional, energetic, and clean, illuminated by bright daylight and modern overhead gym lighting.

static_frame.prompt: A static, eye-level, medium close-up shot of a vibrant, professional fitness presenter named Sienna. Sienna is centered in the frame, looking directly into the camera lens with clear, confident eye contact in a continuous talking-head shot. Her mouth is moving naturally as she actively speaks and delivers her lines, accompanied by warm, expressive facial expressions and natural, energetic hand gestures. Sienna has her hair styled neatly out of her face, and is wearing a matching seamless sage green activewear top and matching athletic gear in a high-quality, modern aesthetic. The atmosphere is professional, energetic, and clean, illuminated by bright daylight and modern overhead gym lighting.

image_critic_report.feedback: Image geometry matches reference anchor perfectly.

video_critic_report.feedback: The video's primary failure is a complete lack of lip synchronization; the subject is speaking to the camera, but her mouth movements do not match the audio track at all throughout the entire video. There is also a noticeable visual glitch/morphing effect on her face around the 0:08 mark, and her hand gestures feel somewhat unnatural and robotic.
